label: Werkorder → UMH API
info:
Sessie 4: Node-RED flow die werkorders aanmaakt via de UMH Core REST API.

Vereist: de api-werkorder standalone flow in UMH Core (poort 8090).

Test met curl:
  curl -X POST http://localhost:1880/api/werkorder \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d '{"order_nr": "WO-001", "product": "BRACKET-A1", "qty": 100, "customer": "Metaalwerk BV", "priority": 1, "due_date": "2026-04-23"}'

name: Bouw UMH API call
200 OK
